notes: Because I already cleared this game on windows, I'm able to test everything from the get go, and every elements of the game works perfectly without any tweaks just like you would expect it to be. I've also tested it with high settings (all maxed out with vsync off), Windowed/Borderless/Full Screen and the performance results are the same on windows, All CG's loaded correctly, and the event scene also works correctly. The only problem that I've encountered is the loading video after you launch the game (Because the loading video is mp4), the video doesn't play and it only gives a black output, It may be able to work if you tweak it by installing wmp with winetricks, but you don't necessarily need it though, just wait for 2 - 3 minutes and the game will run normally.
